title: 10 Piece Glass Grit Sand Paper Fine Medium & Coarse 9" X 11" Wet And Dry Waterproof Sanding Paper Glass Paper Emery Paint Finishing Decorator
features: This Dunnet Tools Wet And Dry Sandpaper Suitable For Use In Art And Craft, Woodwork, Automotive, Metal, And Plastic Applications. Due To The Mixed Grits In This Pack, It Can Be Used To Smoothing Aswell As Finishing.

These Fine Grit Sandpaper Sheets Are Waterproof Which Makes These Abrasive Paper Sheets Sturdy And Able To Last For A Long Time Being Used In Different Projects. They Can Be Used For Both Wet And Dry Applications.
The Sandpaper is 28cm x 23cm, and can be used in your hand or easily be placed on a sanding block. This is also extremely easy to cut into any smaller size you may need.
This Has A Very Flexible Backing That Easily Adapts To Any Surface. The Sandpaper Granule Thickness (grit Rating) Is Printed On The Back For Easy Identification.
Technical Specifications: This Is A Ten Pack Of Mixed Grit Sandpaper. The Grits Included Are 80grit, 180grit, 240grit And 400grit. The Size Of Each Sheet Is Approximately 23cm By 28cm.
